name: nerdio-mcp
description: The first non-PowerShell client for the Nerdio Manager for MSP API - cross-account AVD fleet audits, async-job plumbing, and offline search no other Nerdio tool has.

nerdio_base_url.title: NERDIO_BASE_URL
nerdio_base_url.description: Your NMM instance root URL (per-MSP install), e.g. https://nmm.contoso.com. Required - there is no vendor-global endpoint.

nerdio_token_url.title: NERDIO_TOKEN_URL
nerdio_token_url.description: Entra ID token endpoint for your tenant: https://login.microsoftonline.com/<TENANT_ID>/oauth2/v2.0/token

nerdio_client_id.title: NERDIO_CLIENT_ID
nerdio_client_id.description: Sets NERDIO_CLIENT_ID for the Nerdio Manager MCP server.

nerdio_client_secret.title: NERDIO_CLIENT_SECRET
nerdio_client_secret.description: Sets NERDIO_CLIENT_SECRET for the Nerdio Manager MCP server.

nerdio_oauth_scope.title: NERDIO_OAUTH_SCOPE
nerdio_oauth_scope.description: Sets NERDIO_OAUTH_SCOPE for the Nerdio Manager MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.
